tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsAdclientsAdunitsCreate
tools.description: Creates an ad unit. This method can only be used by projects enabled for the [AdSense for Platforms](https://developers.google.com/adsense/platforms/) product. Note that ad units can only be created for ad clients with an "AFC" product code. For more info see the [AdClient resource](/adsense/management/reference/rest/v2/accounts.adclients). For now, this method can only be used to create `DISPLAY` ad units. See: https://support.google.com/adsense/answer/9183566

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsAdclientsAdunitsGetAdcode
tools.description: Gets the ad unit code for a given ad unit. For more information, see [About the AdSense code](https://support.google.com/adsense/answer/9274634) and [Where to place the ad code in your HTML](https://support.google.com/adsense/answer/9190028).

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsAdclientsAdunitsList
tools.description: Lists all ad units under a specified account and ad client.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsAdclientsAdunitsListLinkedCustomChannels
tools.description: Lists all the custom channels available for an ad unit.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsAdclientsCustomchannelsCreate
tools.description: Creates a custom channel. This method can only be used by projects enabled for the [AdSense for Platforms](https://developers.google.com/adsense/platforms/) product.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsAdclientsCustomchannelsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a custom channel. This method can only be used by projects enabled for the [AdSense for Platforms](https://developers.google.com/adsense/platforms/) product.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsAdclientsCustomchannelsList
tools.description: Lists all the custom channels available in an ad client.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsAdclientsCustomchannelsListLinkedAdUnits
tools.description: Lists all the ad units available for a custom channel.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsAdclientsCustomchannelsPatch
tools.description: Updates a custom channel. This method can only be used by projects enabled for the [AdSense for Platforms](https://developers.google.com/adsense/platforms/) product.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsAdclientsList
tools.description: Lists all the ad clients available in an account.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsAdclientsUrlchannelsList
tools.description: Lists active url channels.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsAlertsList
tools.description: Lists all the alerts available in an account.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsGetAdBlockingRecoveryTag
tools.description: Gets the ad blocking recovery tag of an account.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsList
tools.description: Lists all accounts available to this user.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsListChildAccounts
tools.description: Lists all accounts directly managed by the given AdSense account.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsPaymentsList
tools.description: Lists all the payments available for an account.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsReportsGenerate
tools.description: Generates an ad hoc report.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsReportsGenerateCsv
tools.description: Generates a csv formatted ad hoc report.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsReportsGetSaved
tools.description: Gets the saved report from the given resource name.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsReportsSavedGenerate
tools.description: Generates a saved report.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsReportsSavedGenerateCsv
tools.description: Generates a csv formatted saved report.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsReportsSavedList
tools.description: Lists saved reports.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsSitesGet
tools.description: Gets information about the selected site.

tools.name: accounts.adsenseAccountsSitesList
tools.description: Lists all the sites available in an account.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
